title: Conductor
description: lightweight minecraft mod that handles sound from openAL and processing for lower-end devices, removing choppy sound problems and sound-related performance issues.
body:
Conductor stops Minecraft's audio system from **slowing down your game**.                                                                                                       
  
Every time a sound plays, Minecraft makes your game **wait** for it, which can cause **lag** and **micro-stutters**. This performance mod aims to **remove** these issues, and allow people with lower-end CPUs or devices to run a _lightweight_ mod to target a long-standing issue that Minecraft has had for a very long time.

Made to be used alongside Sodium, Lithium, and other performance mods (too many to list here, but it works with all of them. Let me know if you encounter one that does not in my Discord.) 

_**DISCLAIMER**_: If you are using a sound mod, do not use this mod. it will not work due to conflict issues. I assume if you have the computer to use a mod like Sound Physics or Sound Physics Perfected, you do not need this mod. 

This mod is completely client side, no need to be installed on any server.

Let me know if you liked the mod in my Discord server! I appreciate any feedback you might have.
